name: Diamond Genesis Drop #07 — Partner Mint Pass
description:
Priority on every partner project Diamond ever co-launches. The Pass moves you to the top of partner allowlists before public sale.

Unlockable perk: Allowlist on all partner mints, no application required.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
